Export.zv: IRIS for UNIX (Ubuntu Server LTS for ARM64 Containers) 2026.1 (Build 235U)

XData.name: RuleDefinition
XData.Data: <ruleDefinition alias="" context="EnsLib.HL7.MsgRouter.RoutingEngine" production="DGLABPKG.FoundationProduction"> <ruleSet name="" effectiveBegin="" effectiveEnd=""> <rule name="ORU to EMR"> <constraint name="source" value=""></constraint> <constraint name="docCategory" value="2.3"></constraint> <constraint name="docName" value="ORU_R01"></constraint> <when condition="1" comment=""> <foreach propertypath="HL7.{PIDgrpgrp().ORCgrp().OBXgrp().OBX}"> <when condition="(Segment.{ObservationIdentifier.identifier}="PDFREPORT")&&(Segment.{ValueType}="ED")" comment=""> <send transform="DGLAB.transfo.ORU.transcodage" target="to EMR - FILE"></send> <trace value=""Encapsulted Data""></trace> </when> <when condition="(Segment.{ObservationIdentifier.identifier}="PDFREPORT")&&(Segment.{ValueType}="RP")" comment=""> <send transform="DGLAB.transfo.ORU.transcodage" target="to EMR - FILE"></send> <trace value=""Reference Pointer""></trace> </when> <otherwise> <trace value=""no action""></trace> </otherwise> </foreach> </when> </rule> <rule name="ORU to FILE"> <constraint name="source" value=""></constraint> <constraint name="docCategory" value="2.3"></constraint> <constraint name="docName" value="ORU_R01"></constraint> <when condition="((Source Contains "FILE")=0)&&(HL7.{MSH:ReceivingFacility.namespaceID}="FILE")" comment=""> <send transform="DGLAB.transfo.ORU.transcodage" target="forward to LAB RESULT from DGLAB - FILE"></send> <trace value=""Forward to LAB RESULT from DGLAB - FILE""></trace> </when> </rule> <rule name="ADT to DGLAB"> <constraint name="source" value=""></constraint> <constraint name="docCategory" value=""></constraint> <constraint name="docName" value=""></constraint> <when condition="(Source Contains "IHE PAM")&&(HL7.{MSH:9.1}="ADT")" comment=""> <send transform="DGLAB.transfo.IHEPAM.seances" target="forward Patient Information to DGLAB - MLLP"></send> <trace value=""Forward IHE PAM ADT to DGLAB MLLP""></trace> </when> <when condition="((Source Contains "FILE")=0)&&(HL7.{MSH:9.1}="ADT")" comment=""> <send transform="" target="forward Patient Information to DGLAB - FILE,forward Patient Information to DGLAB - HTTP,forward Patient Information to DGLAB - MLLP"></send> <trace value=""Forward ADT to DGLAB FILE/HTTP/MLLP""></trace> </when> </rule> </ruleSet> </ruleDefinition>

XData.name: DTL
XData.Data: <transform sourceClass='EnsLib.HL7.Message' targetClass='EnsLib.HL7.Message' sourceDocType='HL7v25IHE:ADT_AXX' targetDocType='HL7v25IHE:ADT_AXX' create='copy' language='objectscript' > <annotation>Session-stay handling: if PV1-51=V (visit) the admission/discharge dates (PV1-44/45) are ignored, hence the stay opening/closing/cancellation is ignored; if PV1-51=A (account) the message is handled normally (copy). Title, gender and patient class are transcoded via the shared tables (Titles, Gender, PatientClasses).</annotation> <assign value='..Lookup("Titles",source.{PID:5.5},source.{PID:5.5})' property='target.{PID:5.5}' action='set' > <annotation>Title (PID-5.5) normalized via the SHARED Titles table (common to ADT/ORU)</annotation> </assign> <assign value='..Lookup("Gender",source.{PID:8},source.{PID:8})' property='target.{PID:8}' action='set' > <annotation>Gender normalized via the shared Gender table</annotation> </assign> <if condition='source.{PV1:51}="V"' > <annotation>Visit level (session): ignore stay opening, closing and cancellation</annotation> <true> <assign value='""' property='target.{PV1:44}' action='set' > <annotation>Ignore PV1-44 Admission Date/Time</annotation> </assign> <assign value='""' property='target.{PV1:45}' action='set' > <annotation>Ignore PV1-45 Discharge Date/Time</annotation> </assign> </true> </if> </transform>

XData.name: DTL
XData.Data: <transform sourceClass='EnsLib.HL7.Message' targetClass='EnsLib.HL7.Message' sourceDocType='2.3:ORU_R01' targetDocType='2.3:ORU_R01' create='copy' language='objectscript' > <annotation>ORU transmission: title, gender and patient class transcoded via the SAME shared tables as the ADT reception (Titles, Gender, PatientClasses). Demonstrates sharing a transcoding centralized in the IRIS namespace, which cannot be centralized on the DGLab side.</annotation> <assign value='..Lookup("Titles",source.{PIDgrpgrp(1).PIDgrp.PID:PatientName.prefix})' property='target.{PIDgrpgrp().PIDgrp.PID:PatientName.prefix}' action='set' /> <assign value='..Lookup("Gender",source.{PIDgrpgrp(1).PIDgrp.PID:Sex})' property='target.{PIDgrpgrp(1).PIDgrp.PID:Sex}' action='set' /> </transform>

XData.name: ProductionDefinition
XData.Data: <Production Name="DGLABPKG.FoundationProduction" TestingEnabled="true" LogGeneralTraceEvents="true"> <Description></Description> <ActorPoolSize>1</ActorPoolSize> <Setting Target="Adapter" Name="ShutdownTimeout">5</Setting> <Setting Target="Adapter" Name="UpdateTimeout">5</Setting> <Item Name="HL7" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.MsgRouter.RoutingEngine" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="true" Schedule=""> <Setting Target="Host" Name="BusinessRuleName">DGLAB.router.HL7</Setting> </Item> <Item Name="to EMR - FILE" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.Operation.FileOperation" PoolSize="1" Enabled="false" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="true" Schedule=""> <Setting Target="Host" Name="Filename">from_DGLAB_to_DPI%Q.hl7</Setting> </Item> <Item Name="LAB RESULT from DGLAB - MLLP" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.Service.TCPService" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="true" Schedule=""> <Setting Target="Host" Name="TargetConfigNames">HL7</Setting> <Setting Target="Adapter" Name="JobPerConnection">1</Setting> <Setting Target="Host" Name="AddNackERR">1</Setting> <Setting Target="Host" Name="NackErrorCode">AllE</Setting> <Setting Target="Host" Name="PreACKTCPClear">1</Setting> <Setting Target="Host" Name="SaveReplies">All</Setting> </Item> <Item Name="LAB RESULT from DGLAB - FILE" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.Service.FileService" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="true" Schedule=""> <Setting Target="Host" Name="TargetConfigNames">HL7</Setting> <Setting Target="Host" Name="AddNackERR">1</Setting> <Setting Target="Host" Name="NackErrorCode">AllE</Setting> <Setting Target="Host" Name="SaveReplies">All</Setting> </Item> <Item Name="Patient Information from IHE PAM - MLLP" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.Service.TCPService" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="false" Schedule=""> <Setting Target="Adapter" Name="JobPerConnection">1</Setting> <Setting Target="Host" Name="TargetConfigNames">HL7</Setting> </Item> <Item Name="Patient Information from IHE PAM - FILE" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.Service.FileService" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="false" Schedule=""> <Setting Target="Host" Name="TargetConfigNames">HL7</Setting> </Item> <Item Name="forward to LAB RESULT from DGLAB - FILE" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.Operation.FileOperation" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="true" Schedule=""> </Item> <Item Name="LAB RESULT from DGLAB - HTTP" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.Service.HTTPService" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="true" Schedule=""> <Setting Target="Host" Name="TargetConfigNames">HL7</Setting> <Setting Target="Host" Name="AddNackERR">1</Setting> <Setting Target="Host" Name="EnableStandardRequests">1</Setting> </Item> <Item Name="Patient Information from IHE PAM - HTTP" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.Service.HTTPService" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="true" Schedule=""> <Setting Target="Host" Name="TargetConfigNames">HL7</Setting> <Setting Target="Host" Name="AddNackERR">1</Setting> <Setting Target="Host" Name="EnableStandardRequests">1</Setting> <Setting Target="Adapter" Name="JobPerConnection">1</Setting> <Setting Target="Adapter" Name="Port">9981</Setting> </Item> <Item Name="forward Patient Information to DGLAB - MLLP" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.Operation.TCPOperation" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="false" Schedule=""> </Item> <Item Name="forward Patient Information to DGLAB - FILE" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.Operation.FileOperation" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="false" Schedule=""> </Item> <Item Name="forward Patient Information to DGLAB - HTTP" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.Operation.HTTPOperation" PoolSize="1" Enabled="false" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="false" Schedule=""> </Item> <Item Name="Patient Information from IHE PAM" Category="" ClassName="EnsLib.HL7.Service.FileService" PoolSize="1" Enabled="true" Foreground="false" Comment="" LogTraceEvents="false" Schedule=""> <Setting Target="Host" Name="TargetConfigNames">HL7</Setting> </Item> </Production>

Project.name: EnsExportProduction_2026-06-22 20-02-03_573+2
Project.ProjectDescription: Studio Project generated from Production 'DGLABPKG.FoundationProduction' at 2026-06-22 18:02:03.573 UTC

item.item: Patient Information from IHE PAM - FILE

Patient Information from IHE PAM - HTTP
Patient Information from IHE PAM - MLLP
Patient Information from IHE PAM - MLLP
forward Patient Information to DGLAB - FILE
forward Patient Information to DGLAB - MLLP
forward Patient Information to DGLAB - MLLP
forward to LAB RESULT from DGLAB - FILE

SegmentStructure.name: ZFS
SegmentStructure.description: Mode legal de soins en psychiatrie
